system.notes:
Militech M-010 Minelayer: a self-mobile minelayer RPV that looks like a suitcase-sized box on wheels, weighing 10kg (plus 10kg cargo), with a hamburger-sized sensor turret on top.

Carries 10 anti-personnel mines, or one large anti-tank mine, or a satchel/demolitions charge in its cargo bay. Features a retractable light servo arm (can operate doors and elevators) and complete antiradar/IR stealth plus chameleon camouflage (like the Militech Ghostsuit, Chromebook 2 p.27). Usually programmed to reach an area, lay its mine(s) and return, or to wait for specific targets, or to act as a remote demolition bomb. Cost 10,000 eb. (Mine damage is a property of the mines, not the vehicle: AP mines = frag/HE hand grenade stats; AT mine = 6D10AP to the triggering vehicle's underside + 6D6 within 10m; demo charge = 10D10 within 50m.) [Firestorm: Shockwave p.58]
